# taste-skill (vendor reference)

These files are **reference copies** of [Leonxlnx/taste-skill](https://github.com/Leonxlnx/taste-skill).

They are **not** synced as Alfred agent skills. Install globally via:

```powershell
npx --yes skills add https://github.com/Leonxlnx/taste-skill --yes
```

That installs to `~/.agents/skills/design-taste-frontend/`.
